what_happened: The daylight half-day window showed expected brightening but one comparison stayed borderline.
what_was_expected: The daytime window should have been clearly classifiable as lights-on with no repair capture.
taste_yield_meaning: No immediate crop-path change, but uncertain light evidence weakens near-term vigor judgment.
model_change: Keep the prior prediction, add an amendment reducing confidence in the light inference, and ask the gardener if the next half-day window remains unclear.

attribution.nature: No clear plant-driven deviation in this half-day.
attribution.system: Classification confidence stayed weaker than expected.
